hypothesis._variant_note: v2 family member 5 of 5 (H5: combined). Stacks H2 components + H4 universe + zscore composite. Tests the joint effect of defensive ballast, universe tightening, and a different composite kind. H5-H2 isolates universe contribution; H5-H4 isolates component contribution; H5 overall vs rank-weighted variants isolates composite_kind effect.
hypothesis.thesis_statement: Combining the H2 4-leg composite (GARP x 3 + risk_vol_60d lower-is-better w=0.7) with the H4 tightened universe (ret250_pctile_max=0.95, liquidity_floor=50M) under a zscore_weighted composite at TopK=120/rebalance=20d delivers max_drawdown<=30% and annual_turnover<=3.5x with rank_icir>=0.30.
hypothesis.mechanism: Each individual ingredient (defensive component, universe tightening, composite_kind switch) contributes a different reduction mechanism. Defensive component reduces single-name DD via low-vol tilt. Universe tightening removes the highest-DD-prone tail (top momentum + thin liquidity). Zscore composite preserves continuous score magnitudes across rebalances, which MAY produce smoother weight transitions vs rank-weighted (rank-weighted saturates at universe-quantile boundaries and can swing scores discretely on small fundamental revisions). Joint effect is the test; it is NOT necessarily additive.

source.title: Growth-strategy v2 variant family — H5 combined (H2 + H4 + zscore)

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: Zscore composite preserves outlier magnitudes that rank-weighted truncates. risk_vol_60d in particular has a fat right tail (high-vol names) — the zscore representation may push these names' negative-direction contribution to extreme magnitudes, dominating the composite when growth fundamentals zscore is moderate. Symptom: composite ends up weighting low-vol heavily and growth weakly; rank_icir drops below the H2 baseline while DD doesn't improve.
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: Stacked variants are assumed to be approximately additive in their individual effects. In practice the universe filter (H4) and the defensive component (H2) may overlap — both partly remove high-vol tail names, so the joint reduction is sub-additive. Joint DD may only match H2 or H4 alone rather than reducing further.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: IS gate rejection on (rank_icir < 0.030) at zscore_weighted while H2 (rank_weighted, same components, baseline universe) passes — that pinpoints zscore_weighted as the broken element. IS gate rejection on (max_drawdown > 0.32) when H2 and H4 both pass individually — that pinpoints sub-additivity and the stacked path is not pursued further.
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: Zscore composite may have HIGHER turnover than rank_weighted because outlier moves cause large score swings (rank_weighted saturates). Predicted 4-7x range; cost_adjusted_sharpe ~0.5-0.8 if rank_ic at 0.030.

prescription._note: v2 H5 combined: H2 components (GARP x 3 + risk_vol_60d w=0.7 lower) + H4 universe (ret250_pctile_max=0.95, liquidity_floor=50M) + composite_kind=zscore_weighted. TopK=120, rebalance=20d, max_pos=0.012.
